title: narcissus poeticus var. albus
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. albus, also known as the Poet's Narcissus or White Poet's Narcissus, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant that is native to Europe and is characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and glossy green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus var. albus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and it has also been used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
